response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify song segments and non-music segments. 2. Identified 'CH4NGE' (composed by Giga) and 'Fashion Beat' (composed by DECO*27) from on-screen text. 3. Performed searches for 'CH4NGE' and 'Fashion Beat' lyrics to ensure completeness. 4. Transcribed and escaped lyrics for JSON. 5. Mapped timestamps to the requested format.
response.global_summary: The video showcases a musical performance featuring VTubers Tokoyama Towa and Sakura Miko. It opens with the song 'CH4NGE' followed by a short trailer announcement, and concludes with a performance of 'Fashion Beat' by Sakura Miko.

scenes.description: Tokoyama Towa and Sakura Miko perform the song 'CH4NGE' with intense dancing and holographic visuals. Music is composed by Giga.

scenes.description: The video transitions to a promotional announcement trailer for an upcoming full animation MV and premiere, featuring visual effects and text.
Sakura Miko performs 'Fashion Beat', composed by DECO*27, with dynamic lighting and stage effects.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Painful, even if I close my eyes, I can hear the anxiety show
Even if I worry, it doesn't change, so in any case, I have no choice but to do it
If it's going to break, it's easier to fix
What kind of form can I aim for?

Jump without a running start, dive without a cord
Shouldn't I praise myself for today?
I want to breathe, I want to resonate more
Maybe I can see something beyond myself, my delusions won't stop
Shall I sniff the fashion beat?
I can't spit out things like "it was in my dreams"
Is it up to me to make it come true, or leave it to someone else?
I just want to win against myself
I'll devour this new fashion beat love
I'm sorry, I won't accept losing, it doesn't taste good
No matter how many times, evolution becomes ash, personification of a bug that transforms
Still not rotten yet, yes, not yet

It's stinging me, I'm already tired of it
Sorry, please keep those annoying word games properly put away
I am the rival, the obvious interpretation
I know what to do, but...

Jump without a running start, dive without a cord
Shouldn't I praise myself for today?
If I can't do it, isn't it impossible not to care?
Hey, compared to anyone other than me, it's incredibly boring
Annoying--

Shall I sniff the fashion beat?
I can't spit out things like "it was in my dreams"
Is it up to me to make it come true, or leave it to someone else?
I just want to win against myself
I'll devour this new fashion beat love
I'm sorry, I won't accept losing, it doesn't taste good
No matter how many times, evolution becomes ash, personification of a bug that transforms
Still not rotten yet, yes, not yet, I can't stop
It's not someone else, it's me myself, the personification of a bug that transforms
Still not scattered yet, yes, not yet
